title: Golden Cuff Tavern
content:
''"Go to the Golden Cuff tavern in lower Coruscant."''

''"Tel the bartender who you're looking for. He'll know immediately what to do!"''

''-The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] and [[Diollan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], to young [[Boba Fett]]''.{{Top|leg}}
The '''Golden Cuff Tavern''' was a drinking establishment located on the lower levels of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]]. It was a frequent hideaway for traders, [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] of all stripes. It was also frequented by [[Senator/Legends|senators]], senators' aides, and lobbyists. The proprietor of the Golden Cuff was a four-armed alien named [[Nan Mercador]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the young orphan [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] arrived on Coruscant and went to the Golden Cuff hoping to establish some contacts. While here, he began inquiring about a man called [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. Ironically, Dooku had likewise developed an interest in young Boba and hired several bounty hunters to capture the boy. A [[Diollan]] and a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] bounty hunter attempted to apprehend Boba at the Golden Cuff, however when Nan Mercador learned about the large fee attached to Boba's bounty, he attempted to cash in on it as well. Nan grabbed Boba and pulled him behind the bar, but the young Fett struggled against the larger man and kicked his way to freedom. His freedom was short lived, however, as another bounty hunter, [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], arrived soon after and captured Boba. She dragged him out of the Golden Cuff and took him to Tyranus on the planet [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].
